value.found_quote: An API trigger gives a routine a dedicated HTTP endpoint. POSTing to the endpoint with the routine's bearer token starts a new session and returns a session URL.
value.rationale: The page describes an API trigger for Anthropic's Claude Code routines, where POSTing to a per-routine endpoint with a bearer token starts a session. This is part of the routines feature, which the page explicitly states is "in research preview." The /fire endpoint ships under an experimental beta header, confirming preview status.
